sql.i: select rowguid,itemorder,itemtext,itemname,itemvalue,operatedate,operateguid,remark from abs_codeitem where $like(itemname,itemname) and $like(itemorder,itemorder) and rowguid in (select max(rowguid) from abs_codeitem group by itemorder)
select count(1) from abs_codeitem where itemname={itemname} and $unequal(itemorder,itemorder)
select count(1) from abs_codeitem where $like(itemname,itemname) and $like(itemorder,itemorder)
select itemtext,itemvalue from abs_codeitem where itemorder={itemorder}
select * from abs_codeitem where itemorder={itemorder} limit 1
select count(1) from abs_codeitem where (itemorder={itemorder} or itemname={itemname}) and $unequal(itemorder,olditemorder)
update abs_codeitem set itemorder={itemorder},itemname={itemname} where itemorder={olditemorder}
select itemtext from abs_codeitem where itemorder={itemorder} and itemvalue={itemvalue}
